case_title: ZAMORA, BERTA C. VS GILBERT, VIRGINIA et al

docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY ZAMORA, BERTA C. AS TO DEFENDANT GILBERT, VIRGINIA THE HERTZ CORPORATION. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-10-2002 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION SEP-10-2002, CONTINUED BY COURT TO NOV-19-2002 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506 CONTINUANCE IS FOR PLAINTIFF TO SERVE VIRGINIA GILBERT AND TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE.
CERT MAIL OF PLTF'S CLAIM SENT TO MISS VIRGINIA GILBERT RETURNED--UNCLAIMED
PLTF CONTINUANCE REQUEST, FILED. $10 FEE PAID. TO BE SIGNED BY COMM.
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION JAN-10-2003, CONTINUED BY COURT TO MAR-14-2003 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506 FOR PLAINTIFF TO SERVE DEFENDANT, GILBERT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITH THE COURT.
CERTIFIED MAILING TO THE HERTZ CORP RETURNED TO COURT SIGNED.
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION NOV-19-2002, CONTINUANCE ORDERED PER REQUEST TO JAN-10-2003 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
CERTIFIED MAILING TO VIRGINIA GILBERT RETURNED TO COURT: UNCLAIMED. NOTIFY SENDER OF NEW ADDRESS.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ZAMORA, BERTA C. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GILBERT, VIRGINIA THE HERTZ CORPORATION. $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $42.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,042.00, VIRGINIA GILBERT IS DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE, PER PLAINTIFF. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
